decision.summary: No new action: reconciliation is broken at the day rollover because the Apr 24 daily 77k dip and 79k reach are both missing closure records.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is explicitly broken with two issues: missing closure record for will-bitcoin-dip-to-77k-on-april-24:Yes and missing closure record for will-bitcoin-reach-79k-on-april-24:Yes. Under the playbook, reconciliation is a hard gate for any new entry, so the only valid action is NO_ACTION until the state is repaired. Binance spot is 77432.69, the old weekly 72k dip and weekly 80k reach are both already downgraded to discarded_for_slot, and there are no active price-hit positions left. Even aside from the reconciliation gate, this midnight snapshot is still showing the exhausted April 24 daily board rather than a fresh April 25 slate, so there is no clean new market to act on yet. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to stay flat operationally, record the missing daily closures, and wait for a coherent state plus a clean April 25 board before opening anything new.
